tasks.label: Build Android APK (Release)
tasks.command: dotnet build src/Android/Android.csproj -c Release -p:AndroidKeyStore=true -p:AndroidSigningKeyStore=${workspaceFolder}/android-upload.keystore -p:AndroidSigningKeyAlias=release -p:AndroidSigningKeyPass=RmRnrOkkfWlzUkO1eiT5xnmqcObUSO -p:AndroidSigningStorePass=RmRnrOkkfWlzUkO1eiT5xnmqcObUSO -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=/workspaces/android-sdk && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/release && cp ${workspaceFolder}/src/Android/bin/Release/net10.0-android/de.openelp.regatta-Signed.apk ${workspaceFolder}/release/
